title: PS-59856 Add switching menus handle with Observables that can be canc…
body: Add switching menus handle with Observables that can be cancelled and add a provisional dummy iframe when a component is been loaded instead an iframe .
author: ValdezAbel

review_comments.body: Won't the variable be destroyed after the goes out of scope? Or does the subscription keep it alive?
review_comments.author: kcostenbader

review_comments.body: I remember that PR or feature was postponed, but just to answer The variable   navigateTo$ will be a live until  goes out of scope. But  the subscription will be a live until component be destroyed.
review_comments.author: ValdezAbel

issue_comments.body: @kcostenbader  Can we approve this PR?  it is to verify if still happen the issue in FEA1
issue_comments.author: ValdezAbel
